message:
feat: add mission abort-with-checkpoint, lock lease renewal, and snapshot metadata

plan.rs: add abort_with_checkpoint() that captures in-flight assignment
state, cancellation receipts, and a pre-abort snapshot before aborting.

mcp_missions: add mission_abort_checkpoint_path() and persist abort
checkpoint JSON alongside the existing contract file.

storage: add query_latest_checkpoint_before() for point-in-time
checkpoint retrieval.

lock_orchestration: add try_renew_lease() and lease_remaining() for
proactive lease renewal before expiry. Add test for renewal.

snapshot_engine: add SnapshotMetadata with created_at, trigger, and
source_component fields for snapshot provenance tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
